Home / Service Areas / McKinney

Paving contractor in McKinney, TX

Trusted local professionals serving McKinney and surrounding communities

Serving McKinney, TX

Midway Sealcoating & Striping is dedicated to providing exceptional paving services to the historic city of McKinney, Texas. From the charming homes in the historic downtown area to the newer developments throughout the city, we offer comprehensive solutions to meet your paving needs. Our services include asphalt repair, sealcoating, and striping, ensuring your property maintains its beauty and value.

McKinney's blend of historic charm and modern growth requires a paving contractor that understands the unique needs of both residential and commercial properties.

Paving contractor Services in McKinney

Asphalt Paving

Durable and reliable asphalt paving for driveways, parking lots, and more.

Learn more →

Sealcoating

Protect and extend the life of your asphalt with our professional sealcoating services.

Learn more →

Asphalt Repair

Expert asphalt repair services to fix cracks, potholes, and other pavement damage.

Learn more →

Pavement Striping

Professional pavement striping services for parking lots, roadways, and more.

Learn more →

Concrete Paving

Concrete paving and repair services for sidewalks, patios, and driveways.

Learn more →

Parking Lot Maintenance

Comprehensive parking lot maintenance services to keep your pavement in top condition.

Learn more →

Driveway Paving

Enhance your home's curb appeal with our professional driveway paving services.

Learn more →
